NotesACL.name: AdministrationServer
NotesACL.summary: Server that administers ACL changes (replication source of truth).

NotesACL.name: InternetLevel
NotesACL.summary: Maximum access for HTTP/Internet users (anonymous tier).

NotesACL.name: Roles
NotesACL.summary: Array of role names defined for the ACL.

NotesACL.name: UniformAccess
NotesACL.summary: Whether all replicas enforce the same ACL.

NotesACL.name: AddRole
NotesACL.summary: Adds a new role to the ACL.

NotesACL.name: CreateACLEntry
NotesACL.summary: Creates a NotesACLEntry for a given name and access level.

NotesACL.name: DeleteRole
NotesACL.summary: Removes an existing role from the ACL.

NotesACL.name: GetNextEntry
NotesACL.summary: Next NotesACLEntry after a given entry.

NotesACL.name: RemoveACLEntry
NotesACL.summary: Removes an ACL entry by name.

NotesACL.name: Save
NotesACL.summary: Persists ACL changes back to the database.

NotesACLEntry.name: IsAdminServer
NotesACLEntry.summary: True if entry is the admin server.

NotesACLEntry.name: IsGroup
NotesACLEntry.summary: True if entry represents a group.

NotesACLEntry.name: IsPerson
NotesACLEntry.summary: True if entry represents a person.

NotesACLEntry.name: IsServer
NotesACLEntry.summary: True if entry represents a server.

NotesACLEntry.name: Level
NotesACLEntry.summary: ACL level (No access ... Manager) for this entry.

NotesACLEntry.name: Roles
NotesACLEntry.summary: Array of roles assigned to the entry.

NotesACLEntry.name: DisableRole
NotesACLEntry.summary: Removes a role from this entry.

NotesACLEntry.name: EnableRole
NotesACLEntry.summary: Adds a role to this entry.

NotesACLEntry.name: IsRoleEnabled
NotesACLEntry.summary: True if the named role is enabled for this entry.

NotesACLEntry.name: Remove
NotesACLEntry.summary: Removes this entry from the ACL.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: CertificateAuthorityAvailable
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: True if a CA is reachable for the request.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: CertificateExpiration
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Default expiration date used for certifier requests.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: CertifierFile
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Path to the certifier ID file.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: CertifierPassword
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Password used to unlock the certifier ID.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: AddGroupMembers
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Issues an Adminp request to add members to a group.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: AddInternetCertificateToUser
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Adds an Internet certificate to a person record.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: ApproveResourceDeletion
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Approves a deletion of a resource document.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: DeleteUser
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Initiates an Adminp request to delete a user.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: MoveUserInHierarchy
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Initiates a hierarchical move (recertify) for a user.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: RecertifyUser
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Recertifies a user using the active certifier.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: RegisterNewUser
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Registers a new user in the directory.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: RenameUser
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Initiates a rename request for a user.

NotesAdministrationProcess.name: SetUserPassword
NotesAdministrationProcess.summary: Sets a new HTTP password for a user.

NotesAgent.name: Comment
NotesAgent.summary: Description / comment of the agent design element.

NotesAgent.name: CommonOwner
NotesAgent.summary: Common name of the agent owner.

NotesAgent.name: HasRunSinceModified
NotesAgent.summary: True if the agent has run since its last modification.

NotesAgent.name: IsActivatable
NotesAgent.summary: True if the agent is activatable on this server.

NotesAgent.name: IsEnabled
NotesAgent.summary: True if scheduled execution is enabled.

NotesAgent.name: IsNotesAgent
NotesAgent.summary: True for Notes (Designer) agents (vs. Java agents stored externally).

NotesAgent.name: IsPublic
NotesAgent.summary: True if the agent is shared / public.

NotesAgent.name: IsWebAgent
NotesAgent.summary: True if the agent is invokable from a browser request.

NotesAgent.name: LastRun
NotesAgent.summary: Date/time the agent last ran.

NotesAgent.name: LockHolders
NotesAgent.summary: Array of names currently holding the design lock.

NotesAgent.name: Name
NotesAgent.summary: Agent name (with optional alias). e.g. "Foo|FooAlias".

NotesAgent.name: Owner
NotesAgent.summary: Hierarchical name of the agent owner.

NotesAgent.name: Parent
NotesAgent.summary: NotesDatabase that contains the agent.

NotesAgent.name: Query
NotesAgent.summary: Selection formula or query of the agent.

NotesAgent.name: ServerName
NotesAgent.summary: Server on which the agent is configured to run.

NotesAgent.name: Target
NotesAgent.summary: Document target ("All documents in database", "Selected documents", …).

NotesAgent.name: Trigger
NotesAgent.summary: Trigger type (after new mail, scheduled, action menu, …).

NotesAgent.name: Lock
NotesAgent.summary: Acquires the design-element lock for the agent.

NotesAgent.name: Remove
NotesAgent.summary: Deletes the agent from the database.

NotesAgent.name: Run
NotesAgent.summary: Runs the agent on the current server in the user's context.

NotesAgent.name: RunOnServer
NotesAgent.summary: Runs the agent on the agent's home server.

NotesAgent.name: Save
NotesAgent.summary: Saves changes to the agent design element.

NotesAgent.name: SetServerName
NotesAgent.summary: Sets the server the agent should run on.

NotesAgent.name: Unlock
NotesAgent.summary: Releases the design-element lock.

NotesAgentContext.name: DocumentContext
NotesAgentContext.summary: NotesDocument that the agent is processing (if any).

NotesAgentContext.name: EffectiveUserName
NotesAgentContext.summary: User name the agent runs as.

NotesAgentContext.name: LastExitStatus
NotesAgentContext.summary: Exit status returned by the previous agent run.

NotesAgentContext.name: LastRun
NotesAgentContext.summary: Date/time of the previous agent run.

NotesAgentContext.name: SavedData
NotesAgentContext.summary: NotesDocument used for persistent agent state.

NotesAgentContext.name: UnprocessedDocuments
NotesAgentContext.summary: NotesDocumentCollection of documents not yet processed.

NotesAgentContext.name: UnprocessedFTSearch
NotesAgentContext.summary: Returns unprocessed documents matching a full-text query.

NotesAgentContext.name: UnprocessedSearch
NotesAgentContext.summary: Returns unprocessed documents matching a formula and date.

NotesCalendar.name: ApptUnidProperty
NotesCalendar.summary: Whether iCalendar UID maps to NotesDocument UNID.

NotesCalendar.name: AutoSendNotices
NotesCalendar.summary: Whether the API auto-sends notices on changes.

NotesCalendar.name: Parent
NotesCalendar.summary: NotesSession that owns this calendar handle.

NotesCalendar.name: ReadRangeMask1
NotesCalendar.summary: Bitmask of fields to include in calendar reads (mask 1).

NotesCalendar.name: CreateEntry
NotesCalendar.summary: Creates a calendar entry from an iCalendar string.

NotesCalendar.name: GetEntryByNoteID
NotesCalendar.summary: Returns a NotesCalendarEntry by note ID.

NotesCalendar.name: GetEntries
NotesCalendar.summary: Returns NotesCalendarEntry objects in a date range.

NotesCalendar.name: GetNewInvitations
NotesCalendar.summary: Returns new NotesCalendarNotice objects since a given time.

NotesCalendar.name: ReadRange
NotesCalendar.summary: Returns iCalendar text for entries in a date range.

NotesCalendarEntry.name: EntryID
NotesCalendarEntry.summary: Stable identifier for the calendar entry.

NotesCalendarEntry.name: Notices
NotesCalendarEntry.summary: Array of NotesCalendarNotice for this entry.

NotesCalendarEntry.name: Accept
NotesCalendarEntry.summary: Accepts an invitation tied to this entry.

NotesCalendarEntry.name: Cancel
NotesCalendarEntry.summary: Cancels the entry and notifies attendees.

NotesCalendarEntry.name: Delegate
NotesCalendarEntry.summary: Delegates the meeting to another invitee.

NotesCalendarEntry.name: Read
NotesCalendarEntry.summary: Reads iCalendar text for this entry.

NotesCalendarEntry.name: Remove
NotesCalendarEntry.summary: Removes the entry from the calendar.

NotesCalendarEntry.name: Update
NotesCalendarEntry.summary: Updates the entry with new iCalendar data.

NotesCalendarNotice.name: OutOfDate
NotesCalendarNotice.summary: True if a newer notice supersedes this one.

NotesCalendarNotice.name: UID
NotesCalendarNotice.summary: iCalendar UID associated with the notice.

NotesCalendarNotice.name: Read
NotesCalendarNotice.summary: Returns iCalendar text representing the notice.

NotesColorObject.name: SetRGB
NotesColorObject.summary: Sets the colour by red/green/blue components.

NotesDatabase.name: ACL
NotesDatabase.summary: NotesACL for this database.

NotesDatabase.name: ACLActivityLog
NotesDatabase.summary: Array of strings describing recent ACL changes.

NotesDatabase.name: Agents
NotesDatabase.summary: Array of NotesAgent design elements.

NotesDatabase.name: AllDocuments
NotesDatabase.summary: Unsorted NotesDocumentCollection of every document in the database.

NotesDatabase.name: Categories
NotesDatabase.summary: Database categories string (Database properties).

NotesDatabase.name: Created
NotesDatabase.summary: NotesDateTime for when the database was created.

NotesDatabase.name: CurrentAccessLevel
NotesDatabase.summary: Caller's ACL access level for this database.

NotesDatabase.name: DelayUpdates
NotesDatabase.summary: Defer index/view updates for faster batch writes.

NotesDatabase.name: DesignTemplateName
NotesDatabase.summary: Template name (if inherited from a template).

NotesDatabase.name: DesignLockingEnabled
NotesDatabase.summary: Whether design locking is enabled.

NotesDatabase.name: FileFormat
NotesDatabase.summary: On-disk format / ODS level.

NotesDatabase.name: FileName
NotesDatabase.summary: Filename of the database (no path).

NotesDatabase.name: FilePath
NotesDatabase.summary: Full path of the database file.

NotesDatabase.name: FolderReferencesEnabled
NotesDatabase.summary: Folder references enabled flag.

NotesDatabase.name: Forms
NotesDatabase.summary: Array of NotesForm design elements.

NotesDatabase.name: HttpURL
NotesDatabase.summary: HTTP URL to the database (if any).

NotesDatabase.name: InService
NotesDatabase.summary: True if the database is in service for cluster use.

NotesDatabase.name: IsClusterReplication
NotesDatabase.summary: True if cluster replication is enabled.

NotesDatabase.name: IsDesignLockingEnabled
NotesDatabase.summary: Whether design locking is in effect.

NotesDatabase.name: IsDirectoryCatalog
NotesDatabase.summary: True if this is a directory catalog database.

NotesDatabase.name: IsDocumentLockingEnabled
NotesDatabase.summary: Whether document locking is enabled.

NotesDatabase.name: IsFTIndexed
NotesDatabase.summary: True if a full-text index exists.

NotesDatabase.name: IsLink
NotesDatabase.summary: True if the database is opened via a link.

NotesDatabase.name: IsMultiDbSearch
NotesDatabase.summary: True if part of a multi-database search index.

NotesDatabase.name: IsOpen
NotesDatabase.summary: True if the database is open.

NotesDatabase.name: IsPrivateAddressBook
NotesDatabase.summary: True if local personal address book.

NotesDatabase.name: IsPublicAddressBook
NotesDatabase.summary: True if a server directory (names.nsf).

NotesDatabase.name: LastFTIndexed
NotesDatabase.summary: Date the full-text index was last built/updated.

NotesDatabase.name: LastModified
NotesDatabase.summary: Last modified time of the database.

NotesDatabase.name: LinkBroken
NotesDatabase.summary: True if a link target cannot be resolved.

NotesDatabase.name: Managers
NotesDatabase.summary: Array of names with Manager access.

NotesDatabase.name: MaxSize
NotesDatabase.summary: Maximum size limit configured for the database.

NotesDatabase.name: Parent
NotesDatabase.summary: NotesSession that owns this object.

NotesDatabase.name: PercentUsed
NotesDatabase.summary: Percent of allocated space used.

NotesDatabase.name: ReplicaID
NotesDatabase.summary: Replica ID string.

NotesDatabase.name: Replication
NotesDatabase.summary: NotesReplication settings for the database.

NotesDatabase.name: Server
NotesDatabase.summary: Server name hosting the database (empty for local).

NotesDatabase.name: Size
NotesDatabase.summary: Logical size of the database in bytes.

NotesDatabase.name: SizeQuota
NotesDatabase.summary: Quota limit for the database (bytes).

NotesDatabase.name: SizeWarning
NotesDatabase.summary: Warning threshold for database size (bytes).

NotesDatabase.name: TemplateName
NotesDatabase.summary: Template replica name if applicable.

NotesDatabase.name: Title
NotesDatabase.summary: Database title.

NotesDatabase.name: Type
NotesDatabase.summary: Database type (mail, library, etc.).

NotesDatabase.name: UndeleteExpireTime
NotesDatabase.summary: Soft-deletion retention time in hours.

NotesDatabase.name: UnprocessedDocuments
NotesDatabase.summary: Documents not yet processed by the current agent run.

NotesDatabase.name: Views
NotesDatabase.summary: Array of NotesView views and folders.

NotesDatabase.name: Close
NotesDatabase.summary: Closes the database object handle.

NotesDatabase.name: Compact
NotesDatabase.summary: Physically compacts the database.

NotesDatabase.name: CompactWithOptions
NotesDatabase.summary: Compacts with a flags string for options.

NotesDatabase.name: CreateCopy
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a copy of the database at a new server/path.

NotesDatabase.name: CreateDocument
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a new empty NotesDocument in this database.

NotesDatabase.name: CreateFromTemplate
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a new database from a template.

NotesDatabase.name: CreateFTIndex
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a full-text index with options.

NotesDatabase.name: CreateNoteCollection
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a NotesNoteCollection used for selective design/data export.

NotesDatabase.name: CreateOutline
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a NotesOutline.

NotesDatabase.name: CreateQueryView
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a query view from a Domino Query (DQL).

NotesDatabase.name: CreateReplica
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a new replica on a server.

NotesDatabase.name: CreateView
NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a new NotesView.

NotesDatabase.name: EnableFolder
NotesDatabase.summary: Ensures a folder exists, creating it if needed.

NotesDatabase.name: FTDomainSearch
NotesDatabase.summary: Domain-wide full-text search.

NotesDatabase.name: FTSearch
NotesDatabase.summary: Full-text search; returns NotesDocumentCollection.

NotesDatabase.name: FTSearchRange
NotesDatabase.summary: Paged full-text search returning a range of matches.

NotesDatabase.name: GetAgent
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens a saved agent by name.

NotesDatabase.name: GetAllDocumentsByKey
NotesDatabase.summary: Documents matching a key across the entire database.

NotesDatabase.name: GetAllReadDocuments
NotesDatabase.summary: Documents marked read for a user.

NotesDatabase.name: GetAllUnreadDocuments
NotesDatabase.summary: Documents marked unread for a user.

NotesDatabase.name: GetDocumentByID
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens a document by note ID (hex).

NotesDatabase.name: GetDocumentByUNID
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens a document by universal ID.

NotesDatabase.name: GetDocumentByURL
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens a document by Notes URL.

NotesDatabase.name: GetForm
NotesDatabase.summary: Returns a NotesForm by name.

NotesDatabase.name: GetModifiedDocuments
NotesDatabase.summary: Documents modified since a given time.

NotesDatabase.name: GetOutline
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens a NotesOutline by name.

NotesDatabase.name: GetProfileDocCollection
NotesDatabase.summary: All profile documents for a profile name.

NotesDatabase.name: GetProfileDocument
NotesDatabase.summary: Gets or creates a profile document.

NotesDatabase.name: GetURL
NotesDatabase.summary: Returns a Notes URL for the database.

NotesDatabase.name: GetURLHeaderInfo
NotesDatabase.summary: Returns HTTP header info for a URL.

NotesDatabase.name: GetView
NotesDatabase.summary: Gets a NotesView by name or alias.

NotesDatabase.name: GrantAccess
NotesDatabase.summary: Grants ACL access to a name.

NotesDatabase.name: MarkAllRead
NotesDatabase.summary: Marks all documents read for a user.

NotesDatabase.name: MarkAllUnread
NotesDatabase.summary: Marks all documents unread for a user.

NotesDatabase.name: Open
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens the database on a server/path.

NotesDatabase.name: OpenIfModified
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens if modified since a given time.

NotesDatabase.name: OpenMail
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens the current user's mail database.

NotesDatabase.name: OpenWithFailover
NotesDatabase.summary: Opens with cluster failover.

NotesDatabase.name: QueryAccess
NotesDatabase.summary: Returns ACL level for a name.

NotesDatabase.name: Remove
NotesDatabase.summary: Deletes the database from disk.

NotesDatabase.name: RevokeAccess
NotesDatabase.summary: Removes ACL entry for a name.

NotesDatabase.name: Search
NotesDatabase.summary: Formula search; returns NotesDocumentCollection.

NotesDatabase.name: SetUserIDFile
NotesDatabase.summary: Sets the user ID file used to access the database.

NotesDatabase.name: Sign
NotesDatabase.summary: Signs notes in the database with the current ID.

NotesDatabase.name: UpdateFTIndex
NotesDatabase.summary: Updates the full-text index.

NotesDateRange.name: EndDateTime
NotesDateRange.summary: End of the range as NotesDateTime.

NotesDateRange.name: StartDateTime
NotesDateRange.summary: Start of the range as NotesDateTime.

NotesDateTime.name: IsDST
NotesDateTime.summary: True if Daylight Saving Time is in effect.

NotesDateTime.name: LocalTime
NotesDateTime.summary: Date/time in local zone as text.

NotesDateTime.name: LSGMTTime
NotesDateTime.summary: GMT time as a LotusScript Date variant.

NotesDateTime.name: LSLocalTime
NotesDateTime.summary: Local time as a LotusScript Date variant.

NotesDateTime.name: AdjustDay
NotesDateTime.summary: Adds days (can be negative) to the value.

NotesDateTime.name: ConvertToZone
NotesDateTime.summary: Converts to a different time zone.

NotesDateTime.name: TimeDifference
NotesDateTime.summary: Difference in seconds vs. another NotesDateTime.

NotesDateTime.name: TimeDifferenceDouble
NotesDateTime.summary: Difference in seconds (double precision) vs. another NotesDateTime.

NotesDbDirectory.name: Name
NotesDbDirectory.summary: Server name being enumerated (empty for local).

NotesDbDirectory.name: CreateDatabase
NotesDbDirectory.summary: Creates a new NotesDatabase on the server.

NotesDbDirectory.name: GetFirstDatabase
NotesDbDirectory.summary: First database matching a type filter (DATABASE/TEMPLATE/REPLICA_CANDIDATE).

NotesDbDirectory.name: OpenDatabase
NotesDbDirectory.summary: Opens a database on the server by file name.

NotesDbDirectory.name: OpenDatabaseByReplicaID
NotesDbDirectory.summary: Opens a database by its replica ID.

NotesDbDirectory.name: OpenDatabaseIfModified
NotesDbDirectory.summary: Opens a database only if modified since a given time.

NotesDbDirectory.name: OpenMailDatabase
NotesDbDirectory.summary: Opens the current user's mail database on the server.

NotesDirectory.name: AvailableNames
NotesDirectory.summary: Array of names that have entries in the directory.

NotesDirectory.name: GroupAuthorizationOnly
NotesDirectory.summary: Limit lookups to authorised groups only.

NotesDirectory.name: CreateNavigator
NotesDirectory.summary: Creates a NotesDirectoryNavigator for paged lookups.

NotesDirectory.name: GetMailInfo
NotesDirectory.summary: Looks up mail server / file path for a person.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: CurrentName
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: Name being inspected at the cursor.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: MatchLocated
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: True when a match is located.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: NameLocated
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: True when a name is located.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: FindFirstMatch
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: Positions on the first match in the lookup.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: FindNextMatch
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: Positions on the next match in the lookup.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: FindFirstName
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: Positions on the first name in the lookup.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: FindNextName
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: Positions on the next name in the lookup.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: GetFirstItemValue
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: Reads the first item value at the cursor.

NotesDirectoryNavigator.name: GetNextItemValue
NotesDirectoryNavigator.summary: Reads the next item value at the cursor.

NotesDocument.name: Authors
NotesDocument.summary: Array of names with Author access edits on the document.

NotesDocument.name: ColumnValues
NotesDocument.summary: Array of view column values when accessed via a NotesView.

NotesDocument.name: Created
NotesDocument.summary: Date the document was created.

NotesDocument.name: EncryptionKeys
NotesDocument.summary: Array of secret-key names for field encryption.

NotesDocument.name: EncryptOnSend
NotesDocument.summary: Encrypt the document on Send.

NotesDocument.name: FolderReferences
NotesDocument.summary: Array of folder names that reference this document.

NotesDocument.name: FTSearchScore
NotesDocument.summary: Relevance score from a full-text search.

NotesDocument.name: HasEmbedded
NotesDocument.summary: True if document has embedded objects.

NotesDocument.name: HttpURL
NotesDocument.summary: HTTP URL for the document.

NotesDocument.name: InternetLevel
NotesDocument.summary: Internet access level for the document.

NotesDocument.name: IsDeleted
NotesDocument.summary: True if the document is a deletion stub.

NotesDocument.name: IsEncryptOnSend
NotesDocument.summary: Whether encrypt-on-send is enabled.

NotesDocument.name: IsNewNote
NotesDocument.summary: True if document not yet saved.

NotesDocument.name: IsProfile
NotesDocument.summary: True if the document is a profile document.

NotesDocument.name: IsResponse
NotesDocument.summary: True if the document is a response document.

NotesDocument.name: IsSigned
NotesDocument.summary: True if document carries a digital signature.

NotesDocument.name: IsValid
NotesDocument.summary: False for deletion stubs / invalid handles.

NotesDocument.name: Items
NotesDocument.summary: Array of NotesItem on the document.

NotesDocument.name: Key
NotesDocument.summary: Profile-document key (only valid on profile docs).

NotesDocument.name: LastAccessed
NotesDocument.summary: Date the document was last opened/accessed.

NotesDocument.name: LastModified
NotesDocument.summary: Date the document was last modified.

NotesDocument.name: LockHolders
NotesDocument.summary: Array of names currently holding the document lock.

NotesDocument.name: MimeEntity
NotesDocument.summary: Top-level NotesMIMEEntity attached to the body.

NotesDocument.name: NameOfProfile
NotesDocument.summary: Profile name of the document (for profile docs).

NotesDocument.name: NoteID
NotesDocument.summary: Hex note ID within the database.

NotesDocument.name: ParentDatabase
NotesDocument.summary: NotesDatabase containing this document.

NotesDocument.name: ParentDocumentUNID
NotesDocument.summary: UNID of parent if response hierarchy.

NotesDocument.name: ParentView
NotesDocument.summary: NotesView the document was retrieved from (if any).

NotesDocument.name: Responses
NotesDocument.summary: NotesDocumentCollection of immediate responses.

NotesDocument.name: SaveMessageOnSend
NotesDocument.summary: Save the document in mail file when sent.

NotesDocument.name: SentByAgent
NotesDocument.summary: True if mailed by an agent (vs. a user).

NotesDocument.name: Signer
NotesDocument.summary: Hierarchical name of the signer (if signed).

NotesDocument.name: Size
NotesDocument.summary: Document size in bytes.

NotesDocument.name: UniversalID
NotesDocument.summary: 32-char universal document ID.

NotesDocument.name: Verifier
NotesDocument.summary: Hierarchical name of the verifier of a signature.

NotesDocument.name: AppendItemValue
NotesDocument.summary: Creates and returns a new NotesItem with the given value.

NotesDocument.name: AttachVCard
NotesDocument.summary: Attaches a vCard for a NotesName/NotesDocument.

NotesDocument.name: CloseMIMEEntities
NotesDocument.summary: Closes any open MIME entities (call before save).

NotesDocument.name: ComputeWithForm
NotesDocument.summary: Runs the form's input translation/validation/computed formulas.

NotesDocument.name: ConvertToMIME
NotesDocument.summary: Converts rich-text body to MIME parts.

NotesDocument.name: CopyAllItems
NotesDocument.summary: Copies all items from another document.

NotesDocument.name: CopyItem
NotesDocument.summary: Copies a single NotesItem to this document.

NotesDocument.name: CopyToDatabase
NotesDocument.summary: Copies the document to another database.

NotesDocument.name: CreateMIMEEntity
NotesDocument.summary: Creates a top-level NotesMIMEEntity for the document.

NotesDocument.name: CreateReplyMessage
NotesDocument.summary: Creates a reply NotesDocument from this one.

NotesDocument.name: CreateRichTextItem
NotesDocument.summary: Creates a NotesRichTextItem with the given name.

NotesDocument.name: Encrypt
NotesDocument.summary: Encrypts the document with the configured keys.

NotesDocument.name: GenerateXML
NotesDocument.summary: Generates DXL/XML representation of the document.

NotesDocument.name: GetAttachment
NotesDocument.summary: Returns a NotesEmbeddedObject by attachment file name.

NotesDocument.name: GetFirstItem
NotesDocument.summary: Gets first NotesItem by name.

NotesDocument.name: GetItemValue
NotesDocument.summary: Reads item value(s) by field name.

NotesDocument.name: GetItemValueDateTimeArray
NotesDocument.summary: Reads NotesDateTime/NotesDateRange values from an item.

NotesDocument.name: GetMIMEEntity
NotesDocument.summary: Returns a NotesMIMEEntity by header field path.

NotesDocument.name: GetReceivedItemText
NotesDocument.summary: Returns parsed Received headers.

NotesDocument.name: HasItem
NotesDocument.summary: True if an item with the given name exists.

NotesDocument.name: Lock
NotesDocument.summary: Acquires a soft lock on the document.

NotesDocument.name: MakeResponse
NotesDocument.summary: Makes this document a response to another.

NotesDocument.name: PutInFolder
NotesDocument.summary: Adds the document to a folder.

NotesDocument.name: RemoveFromFolder
NotesDocument.summary: Removes the document from a folder.

NotesDocument.name: Remove
NotesDocument.summary: Deletes the document.

NotesDocument.name: RemoveItem

NotesDocument.name: RenderToRTItem

NotesDocument.name: Send

NotesDocument.name: Sign

NotesDocument.name: Unlock

NotesDocumentCollection.name: Count
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Number of documents in the collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: IsSorted
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: True if the collection is sorted.

NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Parent NotesDatabase.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: Query

NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Adds a document reference to the collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: AddDocument
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Adds a NotesDocument to the collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: Clone
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Returns a copy of the collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: Delete
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Removes a document from the collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: FTSearch

NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Returns a document handle for a member of the collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: GetFirstDocument
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: First document in iteration order.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: GetLastDocument
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Last document in the collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: GetNthDocument

NotesDocumentCollection.name: GetPrevDocument

NotesDocumentCollection.name: Merge

NotesDocumentCollection.name: PutAllInFolder
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Adds all documents to a folder.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: RemoveAll

NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Removes documents that are also in another collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.name: UpdateAll
NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Forces update on all documents in the collection.

NotesDOMParser.summary: Stop parsing on the first fatal error.

NotesView.summary: Readers list for the view design.

NotesView.name: Universalid
NotesView.summary: UNID of the view design note.

NotesView.name: Clear
NotesView.summary: Clears the view's stored full-text query.

NotesView.name: CopyColumn
NotesView.summary: Copies a column to a new position.

NotesView.name: CreateViewNavFrom
NotesView.summary: Creates a NotesViewNavigator starting from an entry.

NotesView.name: CreateViewNavFromCategory
NotesView.summary: Creates a navigator for a category.

NotesView.name: CreateViewNavFromChildren
NotesView.summary: Creates a navigator for child entries of an entry.

NotesView.name: CreateViewNavFromDescendants
NotesView.summary: Creates a navigator for descendants of an entry.

NotesView.name: CreateViewNavMaxLevel
NotesView.summary: Creates a navigator restricted to a max level.

NotesView.name: FTSearch
NotesView.summary: Full-text search scoped to this view.

NotesView.name: GetNextSibling
NotesView.summary: Next sibling document in the hierarchy.

NotesView.name: GetParentDocument
NotesView.summary: Parent document in the response hierarchy.

NotesView.name: Lock
NotesView.summary: Acquires the design lock for the view.

NotesView.name: RemoveColumn
NotesView.summary: Removes a column from the view.

NotesView.name: ResortView
NotesView.summary: Resorts the view by a column.

NotesView.name: SetViewFormat
NotesView.summary: Sets the view display format properties.

NotesViewColumn.name: ColumnValuesIndex
NotesViewColumn.summary: Index used to read values from NotesDocument.ColumnValues.

NotesViewColumn.name: IsResize
NotesViewColumn.summary: True if user-resizable in the client.

NotesViewColumn.name: IsSecondaryResort
NotesViewColumn.summary: True if used as a secondary resort.

NotesViewColumn.name: IsShowTwistie
NotesViewColumn.summary: True if a twistie is shown for categories.

NotesViewColumn.name: IsSortDescending
NotesViewColumn.summary: True if column is sorted descending.

NotesViewColumn.name: ItemName
NotesViewColumn.summary: Item name driving the column value (when not formula).

NotesViewEntry.name: ChildCount
NotesViewEntry.summary: Number of immediate children of the entry.

NotesViewEntry.name: ColumnValues
NotesViewEntry.summary: Array of column values for the entry.

NotesViewEntry.name: Document
NotesViewEntry.summary: NotesDocument for a document entry (Nothing for category/total).

NotesViewEntry.name: DescendantCount
NotesViewEntry.summary: Number of descendants under the entry.

NotesViewEntry.name: FTSearchScore
NotesViewEntry.summary: Relevance score from a full-text search.

NotesViewEntry.name: IsConflict
NotesViewEntry.summary: True if conflict mark is set.

NotesViewEntry.name: IsDocument
NotesViewEntry.summary: True if entry is a document row.

NotesViewEntry.name: IsTotal
NotesViewEntry.summary: True if entry is a totals row.

NotesViewEntry.name: IsValid
NotesViewEntry.summary: True if entry handle is still valid.

NotesViewEntry.name: NoteID
NotesViewEntry.summary: Note ID of the underlying document (when applicable).

NotesViewEntry.name: SiblingCount
NotesViewEntry.summary: Number of siblings of the entry.

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: Count
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Number of entries in the collection.

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: AddEntry
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Adds an entry to the collection.

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: DeleteEntry
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Removes an entry from the collection.

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: GetNextEntry
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Next entry after a given entry.

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: GetPrevEntry
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Previous entry before a given entry.

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: PutAllInFolder
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Adds all underlying documents to a folder.

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: RemoveAll
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Removes all entries (deletes the underlying documents).

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: RemoveAllFromFolder
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Removes all from a folder (does not delete docs).

NotesViewEntryCollection.name: StampAll
NotesViewEntryCollection.summary: Stamps an item on all underlying documents.

NotesViewNavigator.name: BufferMaxEntries
NotesViewNavigator.summary: Max number of entries to read-ahead.

NotesViewNavigator.name: GetEntry
NotesViewNavigator.summary: Entry by note ID or position.
